# Chapter 18: Maintenance, observability, life-cycle  (~120 pp)
- 18.1 Why maintenance is engineering's largest expense and least taught topic (15) · 18.2 Maintenance strategies: corrective, preventive, predictive, prescriptive (18) · 18.3 Condition monitoring (15) · 18.4 Reliability-centred maintenance (15) · 18.5 Observability: what to measure to manage (15) · 18.6 Life-cycle costing revisited (12) · 18.7 Decommissioning and end-of-life (12) · 18.8 Failure section: maintenance neglect as the root cause; the slow accident (18)

**Archetype**: control, ethics, failure. **Project**: design a maintenance schedule for a real piece of equipment with explicit failure-rate assumptions. **Exercises**: 25.
